tiktok.caption: You turned on autopay and it quietly switched off your brain's spending alarm. Here's the $1,700 trap 👇

youtube_short.title: Autopay Is Silently Draining $1,700 From You
title_alternatives: The Autopay Trap Nobody Warns You About ($1,700/yr)
Why Autopay Is Making You Poorer Every Month
youtube_short.description:
You set up autopay to simplify your finances — but neuroscientists call it the 'pain of payment' trap. Every time you manually pay a bill, your brain fires a loss signal that keeps you alert. Autopay kills that signal completely. The result: 7 forgotten charges per household averaging $20/month each, plus price hikes you never notice. That adds up to $1,700 disappearing from your account every year. The fix takes five minutes — open your bank app and cancel two autopay charges today. #personalfinance #money #autopay #savemoney #financetips

Follow for a new money trap exposed every day.

hook_line: Autopay switched off your brain's spending alarm — $1,700/year gone
